concepts.label: Red
concepts.definition: Primary color of long wavelength light, like blood or fire

concepts.label: Blue
concepts.definition: Primary color of short wavelength light, like the sky or ocean

concepts.label: Green
concepts.definition: Secondary color made from blue and yellow, like grass or leaves

concepts.label: Yellow
concepts.definition: Primary color of medium wavelength light, like the sun or lemons

concepts.label: Orange
concepts.definition: Secondary color made from red and yellow, like oranges or fire

concepts.label: Purple
concepts.definition: Secondary color made from red and blue, like grapes or violets

concepts.label: Black
concepts.definition: Absence of visible light or color, like night or coal

concepts.label: White
concepts.definition: Presence of all visible light colors combined, like snow or clouds

concepts.label: Brown
concepts.definition: Dark color made from mixing red, yellow, and black, like wood or soil

concepts.label: Pink
concepts.definition: Light red color made by mixing red and white, like flowers or sunset

concepts.label: Gray
concepts.definition: Neutral color between black and white, like clouds or stone

concepts.label: Gold
concepts.definition: Shiny yellow metallic color, like the precious metal or sun

concepts.label: Silver
concepts.definition: Shiny gray metallic color, like the metal or moon

concepts.label: Turquoise
concepts.definition: Blue-green color like tropical water or the gemstone

concepts.label: Violet
concepts.definition: Purple-blue color like violet flowers

concepts.label: Magenta
concepts.definition: Bright purplish-red color

concepts.label: Cyan
concepts.definition: Bright blue-green color

concepts.label: Maroon
concepts.definition: Dark red-brown color

concepts.label: Navy
concepts.definition: Very dark blue color

concepts.label: Olive
concepts.definition: Dark yellow-green color like olive fruit

concepts.label: Circle
concepts.definition: Round shape where all points are equal distance from center

concepts.label: Square
concepts.definition: Four-sided shape with all sides equal and all angles 90 degrees

concepts.label: Triangle
concepts.definition: Three-sided polygon with three angles that add up to 180 degrees

concepts.label: Rectangle
concepts.definition: Four-sided shape with opposite sides equal and all angles 90 degrees

concepts.label: Sphere
concepts.definition: Three-dimensional round object like a ball

concepts.label: Cube
concepts.definition: Three-dimensional shape with six equal square faces

concepts.label: Star
concepts.definition: Shape with pointed projections radiating from center

concepts.label: Heart
concepts.definition: Shape with two curved tops and pointed bottom, symbol of love

concepts.label: Oval
concepts.definition: Elongated circle shape like an egg

concepts.label: Cylinder
concepts.definition: Three-dimensional shape with circular ends and curved surface

concepts.label: Pentagon
concepts.definition: Five-sided polygon with five angles

concepts.label: Hexagon
concepts.definition: Six-sided polygon like a honeycomb cell

concepts.label: Octagon
concepts.definition: Eight-sided polygon like a stop sign

concepts.label: Diamond
concepts.definition: Four-sided shape rotated to stand on one point

concepts.label: Cone
concepts.definition: Three-dimensional shape with circular base and pointed top

concepts.label: Pyramid
concepts.definition: Three-dimensional shape with triangular sides meeting at a point

concepts.label: Prism
concepts.definition: Three-dimensional shape with identical parallel ends

concepts.label: Ellipse
concepts.definition: Oval shape that is mathematically defined

concepts.label: Rhombus
concepts.definition: Four-sided shape with all sides equal but angles not 90 degrees

concepts.label: Trapezoid
concepts.definition: Four-sided shape with one pair of parallel sides

concepts.label: One
concepts.definition: The number 1, single unit or individual item

concepts.label: Two
concepts.definition: The number 2, pair or couple of items

concepts.label: Three
concepts.definition: The number 3, trio of items

concepts.label: Four
concepts.definition: The number 4, quartet of items

concepts.label: Five
concepts.definition: The number 5, hand with all fingers

concepts.label: Ten
concepts.definition: The number 10, base of decimal system

concepts.label: Hundred
concepts.definition: The number 100, ten times ten

concepts.label: Addition
concepts.definition: Mathematical operation of combining numbers to get sum

concepts.label: Subtraction
concepts.definition: Mathematical operation of taking away numbers

concepts.label: Multiplication
concepts.definition: Mathematical operation of repeated addition

concepts.label: Division
concepts.definition: Mathematical operation of splitting into equal parts

concepts.label: Zero
concepts.definition: The number 0, representing nothing or empty set

concepts.label: Fraction
concepts.definition: Number representing part of a whole, like 1/2

concepts.label: Percent
concepts.definition: Number out of 100, shown with % symbol

concepts.label: Even Number
concepts.definition: Number divisible by 2 with no remainder

concepts.label: Odd Number
concepts.definition: Number not divisible by 2, has remainder of 1

concepts.label: Greater Than
concepts.definition: Symbol > showing one number is larger than another

concepts.label: Less Than
concepts.definition: Symbol < showing one number is smaller than another

concepts.label: Equal
concepts.definition: Symbol = showing two numbers are the same

concepts.label: Plus
concepts.definition: Symbol + used for addition

concepts.label: Minus
concepts.definition: Symbol - used for subtraction

concepts.label: Second
concepts.definition: Basic unit of time, 1/60 of a minute

concepts.label: Minute
concepts.definition: Unit of time equal to 60 seconds

concepts.label: Hour
concepts.definition: Unit of time equal to 60 minutes

concepts.label: Day
concepts.definition: Unit of time equal to 24 hours

concepts.label: Week
concepts.definition: Unit of time equal to 7 days

concepts.label: Month
concepts.definition: Unit of time roughly equal to 30 days

concepts.label: Year
concepts.definition: Unit of time equal to 12 months or 365 days

concepts.label: Monday
concepts.definition: First day of the work week

concepts.label: Tuesday
concepts.definition: Second day of the work week

concepts.label: Wednesday
concepts.definition: Third day of the work week

concepts.label: Thursday
concepts.definition: Fourth day of the work week

concepts.label: Friday
concepts.definition: Fifth and last day of the work week

concepts.label: Saturday
concepts.definition: Sixth day of the week, weekend day

concepts.label: Sunday
concepts.definition: Seventh day of the week, weekend day

concepts.label: January
concepts.definition: First month of the year

concepts.label: February
concepts.definition: Second month of the year, shortest month

concepts.label: March
concepts.definition: Third month of the year, start of spring

concepts.label: April
concepts.definition: Fourth month of the year

concepts.label: May
concepts.definition: Fifth month of the year

concepts.label: June
concepts.definition: Sixth month of the year

concepts.label: July
concepts.definition: Seventh month of the year

concepts.label: August
concepts.definition: Eighth month of the year

concepts.label: September
concepts.definition: Ninth month of the year

concepts.label: October
concepts.definition: Tenth month of the year

concepts.label: November
concepts.definition: Eleventh month of the year

concepts.label: December
concepts.definition: Twelfth and last month of the year

concepts.label: Clock
concepts.definition: Device that shows the time with hands or numbers

concepts.label: Calendar
concepts.definition: Chart showing days, weeks, and months of the year

concepts.label: Morning
concepts.definition: Early part of the day when the sun rises

concepts.label: Afternoon
concepts.definition: Middle part of the day after noon

concepts.label: Evening
concepts.definition: Late part of the day when sun sets

concepts.label: Night
concepts.definition: Dark time when the sun is not visible

concepts.label: Decade
concepts.definition: Period of 10 years

concepts.label: Century
concepts.definition: Period of 100 years

concepts.label: Wood
concepts.definition: Hard material from trees used for building and making things

concepts.label: Metal
concepts.definition: Hard shiny material like iron or steel

concepts.label: Glass
concepts.definition: Transparent hard material you can see through

concepts.label: Plastic
concepts.definition: Synthetic material that can be molded into shapes

concepts.label: Paper
concepts.definition: Thin material made from wood pulp for writing

concepts.label: Fabric
concepts.definition: Cloth material woven from fibers

concepts.label: Stone
concepts.definition: Hard natural rock material from the ground

concepts.label: Rubber
concepts.definition: Elastic material that bounces and stretches

concepts.label: Leather
concepts.definition: Material made from animal skin

concepts.label: Wool
concepts.definition: Soft material from sheep hair used for clothing

concepts.label: Silk
concepts.definition: Smooth shiny material made by silkworms

concepts.label: Cotton
concepts.definition: Soft white material from cotton plants

concepts.label: Concrete
concepts.definition: Hard building material made from cement and stones

concepts.label: Ceramic
concepts.definition: Hard material made by heating clay

concepts.label: Clay
concepts.definition: Soft earth material that hardens when heated

concepts.label: Sand
concepts.definition: Small grains of rock found on beaches

concepts.label: Iron
concepts.definition: Strong magnetic metal that rusts in water

concepts.label: Aluminum
concepts.definition: Light silver metal that doesn't rust

concepts.label: Copper
concepts.definition: Reddish-brown metal that conducts electricity

concepts.label: Steel
concepts.definition: Very strong metal made from iron and carbon

concepts.label: Foam
concepts.definition: Light material full of air bubbles

concepts.label: Cardboard
concepts.definition: Thick paper material used for boxes

concepts.label: Gravity
concepts.definition: Force that pulls objects toward Earth

concepts.label: Magnetism
concepts.definition: Force that attracts iron and steel objects

concepts.label: Electricity
concepts.definition: Energy that powers lights and machines

concepts.label: Light
concepts.definition: Energy that lets us see things

concepts.label: Sound
concepts.definition: Vibrations in air that we hear

concepts.label: Heat
concepts.definition: Energy that makes things warm

concepts.label: Cold
concepts.definition: Lack of heat energy, makes things cool

concepts.label: Pressure
concepts.definition: Force pushing on something

concepts.label: Energy
concepts.definition: Power to do work or cause change

concepts.label: Motion
concepts.definition: Movement from one place to another

concepts.label: Speed
concepts.definition: How fast something moves

concepts.label: Weight
concepts.definition: How heavy something is due to gravity

concepts.label: Force
concepts.definition: Push or pull on an object

concepts.label: Friction
concepts.definition: Force that slows down moving objects

concepts.label: Battery
concepts.definition: Device that stores electrical energy

concepts.label: Circuit
concepts.definition: Path that electricity flows through

concepts.label: Magnet
concepts.definition: Object that attracts iron and steel

concepts.label: Mirror
concepts.definition: Shiny surface that reflects light

concepts.label: Shadow
concepts.definition: Dark area where light is blocked

concepts.label: Echo
concepts.definition: Sound that bounces back to you

concepts.label: Temperature
concepts.definition: How hot or cold something is

concepts.label: Volume
concepts.definition: How loud a sound is

concepts.label: Rain
concepts.definition: Water drops falling from clouds

concepts.label: Snow
concepts.definition: Frozen water crystals falling from clouds

concepts.label: Sun
concepts.definition: Hot bright star that gives Earth light and heat

concepts.label: Wind
concepts.definition: Moving air that you can feel

concepts.label: Cloud
concepts.definition: Water vapor floating in the sky

concepts.label: Storm
concepts.definition: Bad weather with wind, rain, or snow

concepts.label: Thunder
concepts.definition: Loud sound made by lightning

concepts.label: Lightning
concepts.definition: Bright flash of electricity in the sky

concepts.label: Fog
concepts.definition: Thick cloud close to the ground

concepts.label: Hail
concepts.definition: Ice balls falling from storm clouds

concepts.label: Rainbow
concepts.definition: Arc of colors in sky after rain

concepts.label: Frost
concepts.definition: Thin ice crystals on cold surfaces

concepts.label: Dew
concepts.definition: Water droplets on grass in the morning

concepts.label: Ice
concepts.definition: Frozen water when temperature below freezing

concepts.label: Hurricane
concepts.definition: Very strong spinning storm with high winds

concepts.label: Tornado
concepts.definition: Spinning column of air touching ground

concepts.label: Drought
concepts.definition: Long period with no rain

concepts.label: Flood
concepts.definition: Too much water covering dry land

concepts.label: Blizzard
concepts.definition: Heavy snowstorm with strong wind

concepts.label: Sunshine
concepts.definition: Bright light and warmth from the sun

concepts.label: Humidity
concepts.definition: Amount of water vapor in the air

concepts.label: Breeze
concepts.definition: Gentle wind that feels nice

concepts.label: Happy
concepts.definition: Feeling good and cheerful

concepts.label: Sad
concepts.definition: Feeling unhappy and wanting to cry

concepts.label: Angry
concepts.definition: Feeling mad and upset

concepts.label: Scared
concepts.definition: Feeling afraid of something

concepts.label: Excited
concepts.definition: Feeling very happy and energetic

concepts.label: Surprised
concepts.definition: Feeling shocked by something unexpected

concepts.label: Love
concepts.definition: Strong feeling of caring about someone

concepts.label: Hate
concepts.definition: Strong dislike for something

concepts.label: Worried
concepts.definition: Feeling nervous about something

concepts.label: Calm
concepts.definition: Feeling peaceful and relaxed

concepts.label: Jealous
concepts.definition: Wanting what someone else has

concepts.label: Proud
concepts.definition: Feeling good about something you did

concepts.label: Curious
concepts.definition: Wanting to learn or know more

concepts.label: Confused
concepts.definition: Not understanding something

concepts.label: Shy
concepts.definition: Feeling nervous around other people

concepts.label: Brave
concepts.definition: Not afraid to do difficult things

concepts.label: Lonely
concepts.definition: Feeling sad because you're alone

concepts.label: Grateful
concepts.definition: Feeling thankful for something

concepts.label: Guilty
concepts.definition: Feeling bad about something you did wrong

concepts.label: Hopeful
concepts.definition: Believing good things will happen

concepts.label: Disappointed
concepts.definition: Feeling let down when expectations aren't met

concepts.label: Content
concepts.definition: Feeling satisfied and happy with what you have

concepts.label: Eyes
